difficulty.reason: Frost-sensitive, needs warm position, regular watering, and pinching

growth_stages.name: Transplant
growth_stages.look_for: Bushy seedling with aromatic green leaves

prompt.en: Cup a leaf and smell -- it smells like pizza! That's basil!
prompt.da: Hold et blad i din haand og lugt -- det dufter som pizza! Det er basilikum!

growth_stages.name: Bushy Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Plant getting bushier, especially after pinching tips

prompt.en: Pinch off the top two leaves -- it makes two new branches! Magic!
prompt.da: Knib de to oeverste blade af -- det laver to nye grene! Magi!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Abundant leaves ready for picking, may try to flower

prompt.en: Pick a handful of leaves -- we'll make tomato-basil salad with OUR tomatoes and OUR basil!
prompt.da: Pluk en haandfuld blade -- vi laver tomat-basilikum salat med VORES tomater og VORES basilikum!

human_readable.en: Keep moist but not waterlogged. Water at soil level. Wilts dramatically when dry but recovers.
human_readable.da: Hold fugtig, men ikke vandfyldt. Vand ved jordoverfladen. Haenger dramatisk ved toerke, men retter sig.

harvest.notes: Harvest tips to keep bushy. Remove flower buds to prolong leaf production. Classic tomato companion.

companion_plants.notes: Classic companion: improves tomato flavor, repels aphids and whiteflies. Plant within 30cm of tomatoes.

message.en: Basil will die in cold! Cover or bring indoors tonight!
message.da: Basilikum doer af kulde! Daek eller tag ind i aften!

message.en: Basil is probably wilting -- give it a good drink!
message.da: Basilikum haenger nok -- giv den en god taar vand!
